steps.title: Write the earnings equation
steps.content:
Let $x$ be hours at job A and $y$ be hours at job B. The total earnings are
$$10x+20y=s$$

steps.title: Use the graph intercept
steps.content:
The graph includes the intercept $(0,8)$. That means $0$ hours at job A and $8$ hours at job B, so
$$10(0)+20(8)=s$$
$$160=s$$
The answer is B.
